title: Circular logic warning on same bus, but no actual circular logic was used

features.name: ripple carry chain with intermediate carry bus across modules
features.description: Code should include a chain of full adder module instantiations connected by an intermediate carry-out signal bus where lower bits feed inputs and higher bits capture outputs

features.name: unpacked logic vector used across module boundaries
features.description: Code should include an unpacked logic vector that is partially used as input to one module instantiation and partially written as output from another module instantiation
